# barracudawaf_json_profile (Resource)

`barracudawaf_json_profile` manages `JSON Profile` on the Barracuda Web Application Firewall.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "barracudawaf_json_profile" "test_json_profile" {
    name = "test_terraform_json_profile"
    parent = [ "DemoApp1" ]
    host_match = "example.com"
    url_match = "/api/v1"
    method = [ "POST", "PUT" ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- **host_match** (String) Host Match
- **method** (List of String) Methods
- **name** (String) JSON Profile Name
- **parent** (List of String)
- **url_match** (String) URL Match

### Optional

- **allowed_content_types** (List of String) Inspect Mime Types
- **comment** (String) Comments
- **exception_patterns** (List of String) Exception Patterns
- **ignore_keys** (List of String) Ignore Keys
- **json_policy** (String) JSON Policy
- **mode** (String) Mode
- **status** (String) Status
- **validate_key** (String) Validate Key
